Billing Template – Replacement Variables

The following placeholders can be used inside ODT billing templates. They are replaced with the corresponding values when a bill is generated.

Member

VariableDescription
${member.name}Member's last name
${member.forname}Member's first name
${member.fullname}Member's full name (first + last)
${member.registration_number}Member registration number
${member.group}Member's group

Contact

VariableDescription
${contact.name}Contact's last name (empty if no contact linked)
${contact.forname}Contact's first name
${contact.fullname}Contact's full name
${contact.email}Contact's e-mail address
${contact.tel}Contact's telephone number

Event

VariableDescription
${event.name}Event name
${event.costs}Event costs
${event.planned_costs}Planned event costs
${event.registration_costs}Event registration costs (2 decimal places)

Event Member

VariableDescription
${event_member.costs}Member's costs for this event
${event_member.paid}Amount paid by bank transfer
${event_member.paid_cash}Amount paid in cash
${event_member.costs_open}Open amount (costs − paid + paid_cash)
${event_member.comment}Member's comment for this event

Billing

VariableDescription
${billing_number}Bill number
${billing_period.title}Billing period title
${registration_payment}Registration payment / deposit already paid (2 decimal places; 0.00 if not applicable)
${registration_number}Registration number (empty if not applicable)

Organisation

VariableDescription
${org.name}Organisation name
${org.name4bank_transfer}Organisation name for bank transfer
${org.address_street}Organisation street address
${org.address_postal_code}Organisation postal code
${org.address_city}Organisation city
${org.iban}Organisation IBAN

Miscellaneous

VariableDescription
${remittance}Remittance text: event name – member full name
